title: ShareCard
description: The spoiler-free share surface, built ONLY from DayState stats. Mirrors tools/models.py ShareCard and frontend/src/contracts/share.ts. NO placements, solution, or entity values reach this surface (shape-agnostic; the share-noleak contract test asserts no leak). Bundle/runtime, no migration.

evolution.change: Initial ShareCard v1: schemaVersion, date, tier, shapeGlyph, status, moves, wrong, solveMs, hintsUsed, streak.
evolution.why: A stats-only, spoiler-safe card for sharing a result; shapeGlyph is a glyph ref not a layout, so no value id or placement can leak (CLAUDE.md sec 11).
